query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author) AS "n!: i64" FROM (
             SELECT author FROM posts
               WHERE created_at > datetime('now', '-14 days')
                 AND created_at <= datetime('now', '-7 days')
             UNION
             SELECT author FROM threads
               WHERE created_at > datetime('now', '-14 days')
                 AND created_at <= datetime('now', '-7 days')
         )
